pi_items.source: Python script counting exact substring matches of 16S query NR_102804.1 against E. coli K-12 genome NC_000913.3 downloaded from NCBI
Explicitly required in the task description instructions
Explicitly required in the task description instructions
Downloaded NCBI NC_000913.3 fasta and programmatically calculated sequence length

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for ugene_env 16s_rrna_local_blast_profiling task by downloading the real E. coli K-12 genome (NC_000913.3) and 16S query (NR_102804.1) from NCBI. Programmatic verification confirmed exactly 7 copies of the 16S sequence in the genome and a genome size of exactly 4,641,652 base pairs. The expected output GenBank and report paths match the explicit task instructions. Additionally, discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable because the success specification points to a non-existent script.
